name: auckland-transport-helper
description: Helps with AT HOP card, journey planning, fare disputes, and the AT Mobile / website friction points.
longDescription: Handles the messy bits of Auckland public transport — drafting AT HOP balance / refund / fare-dispute messages, decoding an AT Mobile journey plan that doesn't make sense, working out the right concession for your age / status, and helping with lost-card replacement. Also drafts complaints when an AT or NX1/NX2 bus doesn't show. Not authoritative on fares — directs to AT's site for current pricing.
